title: cichlanthus repandus
intro: Cichlanthus repandus, also known as Ginkgo biloba, is a type of flowering plant native to China, with distinctive fan-shaped leaves and a unique life cycle that includes being a dioecious plant, meaning it has separate male and female trees. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-aging effects. The health benefits of Cichlanthus repandus include improving blood circulation, reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, and enhancing cognitive function. Cichlanthus repandus is often used to make herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, which are available over-the-counter in many health food stores and online retailers.
